plugins.name: WooCommerceAnalytics
plugins.description: Drive more revenue, improve your sales funnel, and get accurate insights with our Matomo Analytics Ecommerce tracking integration for your WooCommerce.

plugins.name: FormAnalytics
plugins.description: Increase conversions on your online forms and lose less visitors by learning everything about your users behavior and their pain points on your forms.

plugins.name: EnterpriseBundle
plugins.description: Elevate your global brand’s end-to-end marketing with intelligent analytics, including enterprise-grade compliance and elite support to drive impact at scale.

plugins.name: BusinessBundle
plugins.description: Empower your teams with integrated insights, advanced analytics and enhanced security to drive strategic action and market share.

plugins.name: TeamBundle
plugins.description: Equip your startup or marketing team to make smarter, faster decisions with powerful analytics to drive increased conversion and revenue growth.

plugins.name: HeatmapSessionRecording
plugins.description: Truly understand your visitors by seeing where they click, hover, type and scroll. Replay their actions in a video and ultimately increase conversions.

plugins.name: CrashAnalytics
plugins.description: Detect crashes to improve the user experience, increase conversions and recover revenue. Resolve them with insights to minimise developer hours.

plugins.name: CustomReports
plugins.description: Pull out the information you need in order to be successful. Develop your custom strategy to meet your individualized goals while saving money & time.

plugins.name: LoginSaml
plugins.description: Provides SAML-based Single Sign-On (SSO) support for Matomo. Works with any Identity Provider (IdP) such as OneLogin, Microsoft Entra ID, Google, and.

plugins.name: AdvertisingConversionExport
plugins.description: Provides an export of attributed goal conversions for usage in ad networks like Google Ads so you no longer need a conversion pixel.

plugins.name: AbTesting
plugins.description: Increase revenue and conversions by comparing different versions of your websites or apps & detect the winning variation that will grow your business!

plugins.name: Funnels
plugins.description: Identify and understand where your visitors drop off to increase your conversions, sales and revenue with your existing traffic.

plugins.name: Cohorts
plugins.description: Track your retention efforts over time and keep your visitors engaged and coming back for more.

plugins.name: MediaAnalytics
plugins.description: Grow your business with advanced video & audio analytics. Get powerful insights into how your audience watches your videos and listens to your audio.

plugins.name: UsersFlow
plugins.description: Users Flow is a visual representation of the most popular paths your users take through your website & app which lets you understand your users needs.

plugins.name: SEOWebVitals
plugins.description: Improve your website performance, rank higher in search results and optimise your visitor experience with SEO Web Vitals.

plugins.name: SearchEngineKeywordsPerformance
plugins.description: All keywords searched by your users on search engines are now visible into your Referrers reports! The ultimate solution to 'Keyword not defined'.

plugins.name: RollUpReporting
plugins.description: At a glance, see how several of your websites, mobile apps & shops are performing overall. Get new insights into your business & save time every day.

plugins.name: MultiChannelConversionAttribution
plugins.description: Get a clear understanding of how much credit each of your marketing channel is actually responsible for to shift your marketing efforts wisely.

plugins.name: ActivityLog
plugins.description: Get a detailed audit log of all activities happening in your Matomo Analytics for increased security, risk management, and problem diagnostic.

plugins.name: WhiteLabel
plugins.description: Give your users and clients access to a more streamline analytics experience that is less confusing and lets your own branding shine.
